pages.homepage_text:
Northlight Marketing Agency is a marketing agency in Brooklyn, NY. Founded 2019. We're a team of 20.
Why Brooklyn chooses us
For more than 7 years Northlight Marketing Agency has served Brooklyn and the surrounding NY region with dependable, locally-operated marketing agency work. Our team of 20 knows the neighborhoods, the buildings, and the seasonal rhythms that shape what our clients actually need — the kind of practical knowledge you only build by showing up in the same zip codes year after year.
Who we serve
We work with homeowners, small businesses, and repeat commercial accounts across Brooklyn. Whether you've worked with a marketing agency before or this is your first project, we walk every new client through the process step by step: what to expect, what options exist at your price point, and what we'd recommend if the job were on our own property. No hard sell, no upsell theatre, no contracts you can't cancel.
What we do
Our core offerings cover brand strategy, web design, paid social, and content production. Every engagement starts with a site walkthrough and a written scope so there are no surprises on invoice day.
- Brand strategy
- Web design
- Paid social
- Content production
Credentials & proof
Northlight Marketing Agency is fully insured and holds every permit and certification the state of NY requires for our trade. Our team of 20 collectively brings decades of hands-on experience, and we publish before-and-after galleries, customer reviews, and project case studies so prospective clients can see the actual work — not just marketing renders.
Get in touch
Email: hello@example.test · Phone: (555) 555-0100
